title: sphaeranthus peguensis
intro: Sphaeranthus peguensis, also known as the East Indian flower or button bush, is a plant species in the daisy family native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries like India, China, and Indonesia. The plant's medicinal properties have been extensively studied, and it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus peguensis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, with some traditional practitioners also using it in topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
